shared_visual_direction.mood: Minimalist premium, exact, quiet, and product-specific.
prohibitions: No ornamental gradients, chatbot panels, neon accents, or speculative AI visuals.
No support region that competes with the dominant action surface.

rules: Four-surface composition may show a vertical module picker and full detail drawer.
Primary calm hierarchy remains `CONTEXT_BAR -> DECISION_SUMMARY -> ACTION_STRIP -> DETAIL_DRAWER`.
Module picker may collapse to segmented control.
The drawer stays promoted but may redock into a shallower panel.
Active drawer module takes full width.
Customer and internal activity threads never sit side by side.

shared_visual_system.typography_ui: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", "Segoe UI", sans-serif

source_refs: Algorithm/cross_shell_design_token_and_interaction_layer_foundation_contract.md::CALM_SHELL[Maps calm-shell design tokens and behavior policies.]
Algorithm/low_noise_experience_contract.md::Operator interaction layer[Freezes operator-specific interaction policies and notification surfaces.]

rules: Keep one primary task column with subordinate help/history.
Portal tabs remain the only top-level navigation surface.
Stack support below the primary task before removing important task context.
Keep the same tab, same primary action, and same return path.
Resume upload, request, or approval sessions in the same route context.
No mobile-only alternate route family is allowed.

shared_visual_system.typography_ui: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", "Segoe UI", sans-serif

source_refs: Algorithm/cross_shell_design_token_and_interaction_layer_foundation_contract.md::CLIENT_PORTAL_SHELL[Maps portal design tokens and behavior policies.]
Algorithm/customer_client_portal_experience_contract.md::Shell continuity, support budget, and constrained layouts[Defines the portal interaction layer and support-region law.]

rules: May show all five structural regions at once.
One promoted auxiliary surface still governs user attention.
Keep `WORKSPACE_CANVAS` primary and redock the audit sidecar into a drawer or tabbed inspector.
Preserve active filters, selected object, and focus anchor.
Move `SECTION_NAV` into compact tabs or menus.
Collapse `INVENTORY_RAIL` into a filter-and-selection tray and keep one promoted support region at a time.

layout_budget.compact_mode_rule: redock auxiliary surfaces without changing shell meaning

shared_visual_system.typography_ui: Inter, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "SF Pro Text", "Segoe UI", sans-serif

source_refs: Algorithm/cross_shell_design_token_and_interaction_layer_foundation_contract.md::GOVERNANCE_DENSITY_SHELL[Maps governance design tokens and behavior policies.]
